_meta.purpose: data-free half of a fair per-bit Pareto (acc x bpw); merges with ptqtp_gptq.py (data-aware)

reused.eval: exp_frontier.evalmulti / load_fp (lm_eval HFLM, gsm8k flexible-extract + arc acc_norm + hella acc_norm)
reused.sasori_quant: exp_moe_distill.fake_quant_k_ (joint-ridge K-plane; == exp_frontier.fresh_k's quant, group passed explicitly)

_meta.rtn: data-free symmetric integer round-to-nearest, per (row, group-block); targets EXACTLY fake_quant_k_'s module set (same filters); no calibration data

bpw_conventions.rtn.bpw: bits + 16/group  — raw integer storage (symmetric, no zero-point)
bpw_conventions.note: sasori.bpw (entropy) and rtn.bpw (raw) are DIFFERENT conventions; for a strict same-storage Pareto use sasori.bpw_packed vs rtn.bpw. Both are recorded.
